caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Martinique
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds of 14 kt and wave heights of 3.0 ft, while St. Thomas is seeing winds of 21 kt. I expect the strong winds and high rain probability in Martinique to be the most impactful weather story in the Caribbean today, with St. Thomas being a close runner-up due to its higher wind speeds.

mediterranean.headline: MediterraneanPorts Experience Gentle Breeze
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing a 38% rain probability with winds at 11 kt and wave heights reaching 2.6 ft, while Haifa has a less than 10% rain probability with winds at 12 kt. I expect these conditions to prevail throughout the day, with the dominant swell direction from the west at both ports.
